mapper.select: SELECT p.*, s.company_name FROM products p JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}

SELECT p.product_id, p.seller_id, p.category_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.sale_price, p.stock, p.sale_start_at, p.sale_end_at, p.delivery_fee, p.free_shipping, p.status, p.image_l, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.sale_price_updated_at,
s.company_name,
IFNULL(rv.review_avg, 0) AS review_avg, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS review_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, AVG(rating) AS review_avg, COUNT(review_id) AS review_count FROM reviews GROUP BY product_id ) rv ON p.product_id = rv.product_id
WHERE p.product_id = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( seller_id, category_id, name, description, price, sale_price, sale_start_at, sale_end_at, stock, delivery_fee, free_shipping, status, image_l, sale_price_updated_at ) VALUES ( #{seller_id}, #{category_id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{sale_price}, #{sale_start_at}, #{sale_end_at}, #{stock}, #{delivery_fee}, #{free_shipping}, 'APPROVED', #{image_l}, CASE WHEN #{sale_price} > 0 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT p.*, s.company_name FROM products p JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}

SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND ( category_id = #{category_id} OR category_id IN ( SELECT category_id FROM categories WHERE parent_id = #{category_id} ) )
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price > 0 AND sale_price < price THEN ((price - sale_price) / price) ELSE 0 END DESC, product_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price > 0 AND sale_price < price THEN sale_price ELSE price END ASC, product_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price > 0 AND sale_price < price THEN sale_price ELSE price END DESC, product_id DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}

SELECT p.*, s.company_name FROM products p JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT p.*, s.company_name,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN FLOOR(((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS sale_rate
FROM products p
JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED'
AND ( p.category_id IN
#{categoryId}
OR p.category_id IN ( SELECT c.category_id FROM categories c WHERE c.parent_id IN
#{categoryId}
) )
AND ( p.category_id = #{category_id} OR p.category_id IN ( SELECT c.category_id FROM categories c WHERE c.parent_id = #{category_id} ) )
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) <= 10000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) > 10000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) <= 20000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) > 20000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) <= 30000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) > 30000
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT p.*, s.company_name FROM products p JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' AND p.category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT bp.category_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products bp ON oi.product_id = bp.product_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'PAID' ) ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.*, s.company_name,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN FLOOR(((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS sale_rate
FROM products p
JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED'
AND ( p.category_id IN
#{categoryId}
OR p.category_id IN ( SELECT c.category_id FROM categories c WHERE c.parent_id IN
#{categoryId}
) )
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) <= 10000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) > 10000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) <= 20000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) > 20000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) <= 30000
AND ( CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END ) > 30000
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.*, s.company_name,
FLOOR(((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price) * 100) AS sale_rate,
IFNULL(fv.favorite_count, 0) AS favorite_count, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS review_count, IFNULL(sa.sales_count, 0) AS sales_count
FROM products p
JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS favorite_count FROM favorites GROUP BY product_id ) fv ON p.product_id = fv.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM reviews GROUP BY product_id ) rv ON p.product_id = rv.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.product_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS sales_count FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED') GROUP BY oi.product_id ) sa ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' AND p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price
AND p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(p.sale_start_at) = CURDATE() AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) = CURDATE()
AND p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at)
AND p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL
AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) )
ORDER BY ( IFNULL(fv.favorite_count, 0) + IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) + IFNULL(sa.sales_count, 0) ) DESC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY IFNULL(fv.favorite_count, 0) DESC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) DESC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY IFNULL(sa.sales_count, 0) DESC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY ((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price) DESC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY p.sale_price ASC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY p.sale_price DESC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' AND p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price
AND p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(p.sale_start_at) = CURDATE() AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) = CURDATE()
AND p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at)
AND p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL
AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) )

SELECT p.*, s.company_name,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN FLOOR(((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS sale_rate,
IFNULL(fv.favorite_count, 0) AS favorite_count, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS review_count, IFNULL(sa.sales_count, 0) AS sales_count,
( IFNULL(sa.sales_count, 0) * 5 + IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(fv.favorite_count, 0) ) AS best_score
FROM products p
JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS favorite_count FROM favorites GROUP BY product_id ) fv ON p.product_id = fv.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM reviews GROUP BY product_id ) rv ON p.product_id = rv.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.product_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS sales_count FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED')
GROUP BY oi.product_id ) sa ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED'
ORDER BY ( IFNULL(sa.sales_count, 0) * 5 + IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(fv.favorite_count, 0) ) DESC, p.product_id DESC

SELECT * FROM products
status = #{status}
ORDER BY price ASC
ORDER BY price DESC
ORDER BY stock ASC
ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT * FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{seller_id} AND status = 'APPROVED'
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price IS NOT NULL AND sale_price > 0 THEN sale_price ELSE price END ASC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price IS NOT NULL AND sale_price > 0 THEN sale_price ELSE price END DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT p.*, s.company_name,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN FLOOR(((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS sale_rate
FROM products p
JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' AND p.stock > 0
AND p.category_id IN
#{category_id}
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED') AND oi.product_id = p.product_id )
ORDER BY FIELD( p.category_id,
#{category_id}
), p.product_id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT category_id FROM (
SELECT p.category_id, COUNT(*) * 5 AS score FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.user_id = #{value} AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED')
GROUP BY p.category_id
UNION ALL
SELECT p.category_id, COUNT(*) * 4 AS score FROM favorites f
JOIN products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE f.user_id = #{value}
GROUP BY p.category_id
UNION ALL
SELECT p.category_id, COUNT(*) * 3 AS score FROM cart_items c
JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE c.user_id = #{value}
GROUP BY p.category_id
UNION ALL
SELECT p.category_id, COUNT(*) * 2 AS score FROM product_view_log pv
JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE pv.user_id = #{value}
GROUP BY p.category_id
) taste
GROUP BY category_id
ORDER BY SUM(score) DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT p.*, s.company_name,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN FLOOR(((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS sale_rate
FROM products p
JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' AND p.stock > 0
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
